personalInfo.name: Mohamed Boumeroine
personalInfo.title: Senior R&D Engineer
personalInfo.subtitle: Angular | Spring Boot | Microservices
personalInfo.bio: Senior R&D Engineer with 4+ years of experience designing and building enterprise-grade applications. I specialize in Angular micro-frontends and Spring Boot microservices, delivering scalable solutions for government and HR platforms. Passionate about clean architecture, DevOps automation, and turning complex business requirements into robust, maintainable software.

projects.title: BL-WERH — HR Management Platform
projects.description: Enterprise HR solution for French municipalities, managing employee records, contracts, careers, and payroll cycles.
projects.longDescription: Developed a comprehensive HR management platform for French municipalities at Berger-Levrault. Built backend microservices with Java 17 and Spring Boot for managing employee records, contracts, career paths, and the full payroll cycle. Designed and implemented dedicated Angular micro-frontends for employee profiles and payroll tracking. Created the API-Edition service for generating, viewing, and downloading pay slips in PDF format using JasperReports. Implemented asynchronous inter-service communication via Kafka (bl-exchange) for syncing business events across HR services. Managed database versioning with Liquibase and documented all APIs with OpenAPI.

projects.title: BL-HubTyt — E-Government Hub
projects.description: Multi-tenant electronic administration hub built on microservices and micro-frontend architecture with full CI/CD pipeline.
projects.longDescription: Designed and developed a multi-tenant HUB for electronic administration at Berger-Levrault, built on a microservices and micro-frontend architecture with industrialization and multi-tenant capabilities. Implemented an API Gateway for centralized management and security of APIs and microservices. Set up key infrastructure including Spring Cloud Load Balancer, Gitea, Keycloak for authentication, and Redis for caching. Integrated RabbitMQ as a message broker for seamless inter-service communication. Created unit tests improving code coverage, tracked with SonarQube. Built and managed CI/CD pipelines with GitLab CI/CD.

projects.title: BL-ATM — Automated Test Manager
projects.description: Katalon Studio plugin for synchronizing Gherkin scenarios between Jira and Katalon, enabling full E2E test automation.
projects.longDescription: Developed a JAR plugin for Katalon Studio that synchronizes Gherkin scenarios from Jira tickets and imports them directly into Katalon. Features include editing Gherkin scenarios from Katalon, automatic updates back to Jira, Gherkin syntax validation, and matching scenarios with existing records. Enabled complete end-to-end test automation through the plugin, allowing scenario execution directly from Katalon Studio. Built with Java 7, SWT for the UI, and integrated with Zephyr Scale and Zephyr API.

projects.title: B2B CRM E-Commerce App
projects.description: Cross-platform mobile CRM application for B2B e-commerce, designed, developed, and deployed from scratch.
projects.longDescription: End-of-studies internship project at Progiciel System. Designed, developed, and deployed a full CRM e-commerce application for B2B operations, available on both Android and iOS. Built the mobile frontend with Flutter for a native cross-platform experience, powered by a Laravel backend with MySQL database. Deployed on OVHCloud infrastructure with FTP server management. Managed project tasks and sprints using Jira under Agile/Scrum methodology.
